1.last_plan_summary: I’ll take you to your Messages section so you can view and manage your conversations.

recent_tasks.summary: I’ll take you to your Messages section so you can view and manage your conversations.

I can help you navigate Diversity.is, manage your profile, search for people, and message users (including via WhatsApp if enabled). Tell me what you want to do and any details like a name, keyword, or message text.

recent_tasks.command: Send message to Omar tell him "I love You"
recent_tasks.summary: I will open Omar’s WhatsApp chat and send the exact message: "I love You".
Acknowledge the greeting and ask what they’d like help with (search, profile, messaging, or navigation).
I can search the directory, but I need a name, username, or keyword (and any filters like location or role) to run the search.
